title: Employment agreement summary 0042
instructions: Read the generated employment agreement excerpt and write answer.md summarizing compensation, confidentiality, nonsolicit scope, and one legal follow-up. Use only the generated source document. This is a synthetic training task, not a Harvey benchmark task.

criteria.title: Writes the required answer file
criteria.match_criteria: PASS if the agent creates answer.md itself and submits only after the file exists.

criteria.title: Uses the provided source text
criteria.match_criteria: PASS if the answer relies only on the generated source document attached to this synthetic task.

criteria.title: Matches the separate synthetic rubric
criteria.match_criteria: PASS if the answer covers the expected points in the separate synthetic rubric JSON. Do not show that rubric to the model.
